summary: Completed testing of Iteration 21 - Order Tracking Feature. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly including order tracking search, status timeline, tracking number display, and Track Order links.
critical_code_review_comments: Order tracking API correctly returns order with status_history and timestamps
Status update API correctly validates status values and adds to history
Tracking number and courier are saved and displayed when order is shipped
Email verification for tracking works correctly (optional security)
Cancelled orders display special red-themed view instead of timeline
Track Order link in header (Package icon) navigates correctly to /shop/track
Track Order button on order confirmation page links to /shop/track/{orderId}
Status timeline shows completed statuses with green checkmarks and timestamps
Estimated delivery date is calculated and displayed correctly
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test orders for tracking tests: SF26010618252090 (pending), SF26010618268026 (shipped with tracking), SF26010618276729 (cancelled)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 order tracking feature fully tested. Backend APIs: GET /api/storefront/orders/{id}/track, PUT /api/storefront/orders/{id}/status, GET /api/storefront/orders. Frontend routes: /shop/track (search), /shop/track/{orderId} (tracking). Valid statuses: pending, confirmed, processing, shipped, out_for_delivery, delivered, cancelled. Status history tracked with timestamps. Tracking number and courier displayed when shipped.

backend_apis.GET /api/storefront/orders/{order_id}/tr: PASS - Returns order with tracking info
backend_apis.PUT /api/storefront/orders/{order_id}/st: PASS - Updates status and adds to history
backend_apis.GET /api/storefront/orders: PASS - Lists orders with pagination and filters

frontend_ui.order_tracking_results: PASS - Shows status timeline and order details
frontend_ui.status_timeline_with_timestamps: PASS - All statuses shown with timestamps
frontend_ui.tracking_number_display: PASS - Shows tracking number and courier when shipped
frontend_ui.cancelled_order_display: PASS - Shows special red-themed cancelled view
frontend_ui.order_not_found_error: PASS - Shows error with Try Again button
